verifier.py script logic which requires a score of >= 60 to pass

privileged_info_summary: The task dynamically creates a completely synthetic Python codebase containing five explicitly injected logical bugs related to SVG generation, Bézier curves, HSL-to-RGB color mapping, and animation timelines. O*NET code 27-1014.00 historically matched 'Multimedia Artists and Animators' and is currently titled 'Special Effects Artists and Animators'. The 'industry' metadata accurately reflects the SOC Major Group 27-0000. All reported features (python_debugging, graphics_math, bezier_curves, svg_spec, test_driven_development) are confirmed to be exercised by the task's script configuration and pytest suite. The passing threshold of 60 points corresponds exactly to fixing 3 out of the 5 injected bugs (each worth 20 points), as verified in verifier.py.
